name: True Swing Golf LLC
about: True Swing Golf LLC is a golf simulator venue offering players the ability to practice and play golf on virtual courses. The facility features simulators that allow users to swing, play, and progress in their game as if they were on a real course. It is open 24 hours daily and is suitable for both individual practice and group activities. The venue provides a convenient option for golfers to enjoy the game at any time, with a focus on accessibility and playability.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access for flexible play and practice
Suitable for both individual skill development and group social play
Convenient virtual course simulation that mimics real-world golfing conditions

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available
No information on alcohol service available

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs to ensure you have the equipment you need.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no information available on the website regarding outside food and drink policies. It is best to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for completing 18 holes, as this can vary depending on simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specifically mention child-friendly features or policies. For families with children, it is advised to contact the venue directly to inquire about suitability.
